title: ValuationRecord
description: Container for a single valuation event. Triggered by deal updates (earnings, financing round, valuation mark, exit) or by the scheduled quarterly review. Contains input assumptions, results, and human approval status.

ValuationInput.title: ValuationInput
ValuationInput.description: The raw inputs used to compute this valuation.

deal_id.description: UUID of the parent Deal record.

update_ref.description: Relative path to the DealUpdate that triggered this valuation. Null if triggered manually or by schedule.

asset_type.description: Asset class — determines which method sub-schema is applicable.

method.description: Valuation methodology used. Guardrail: VC/PE deals <2 years old should default to cost-basis or last-round. Real estate requires appraisal or dcf. Public equity must use mark-to-market.

inputs.description: Method-specific input parameters. One of the sub-schemas below applies based on 'method'.

projected_cash_flows_usd.description: Annual free cash flow projections in USD. Index 0 = Year 1.

discount_rate_pct.description: Weighted average cost of capital (WACC) or required rate of return. Guardrail: VC deals typically 25-40%; real estate 8-12%.

terminal_growth_rate_pct.description: Long-term growth rate for terminal value. Guardrail: should not exceed GDP growth (3%) for mature businesses.

terminal_multiple.description: Exit multiple on final year FCF (alternative terminal value method). If set, overrides terminal_growth_rate_pct.

metric_type.description: The financial metric the multiple is applied to.

metric_value.description: Current period value of the metric in USD.

multiple_used.description: EV/metric multiple applied. Guardrail: document source of comps.

comparable_companies.description: Names or tickers of comparable companies used to derive the multiple.

discount_for_illiquidity_pct.description: Discount applied for illiquidity (private vs. public). Typical range 20-35%.

oneOf.title: NAVInputs
oneOf.description: Applicable when method = nav (funds, real estate portfolios)

reported_nav_usd.description: Net asset value as reported by the fund manager or property manager.

nav_date.description: Date as of which the NAV was calculated.

family_office_ownership_pct.description: Family office ownership percentage of the fund/vehicle.

unfunded_commitment_usd.description: Remaining capital commitment not yet called.

oneOf.title: CostBasisInputs
oneOf.description: Applicable when method = cost-basis or last-round

cost_basis_usd.description: Total invested capital to date in USD.

last_round_pre_money_usd.description: Pre-money valuation from most recent financing round.

ValuationResult.title: ValuationResult
ValuationResult.description: The output of the valuation calculation — low/mid/high range, confidence, and approval status.

value_low_usd.description: Conservative (bear case) estimated value in USD.

value_mid_usd.description: Base case estimated value in USD. This is the number used in portfolio reporting.

value_high_usd.description: Optimistic (bull case) estimated value in USD.

confidence.description: Confidence level. 'high' = mark-to-market or recent appraisal. 'medium' = comparable or NAV. 'low' = cost-basis on early-stage with no recent data. Guardrail: 'low' confidence always requires human_approved=true before use in reporting.

assumptions.description: Plain-language list of key assumptions used in this valuation. Required — minimum 3 items.
examples: Applied 6.5x ARR multiple based on SaaS comps at similar growth rate and NRR
Applied 25% illiquidity discount for private company
Used Q2 2026 ARR of $4.2M as base metric

method_notes.description: Narrative explanation of method choices, comparable selection, or any unusual adjustments.
examples: Used trailing ARR rather than forward ARR due to incomplete Q3 visibility. Comps sourced from PitchBook SaaS index June 2026.

human_approved.description: Whether a human has reviewed and approved this valuation. Guardrail: all valuations with confidence='low' or value_mid_usd > $500,000 must be human_approved=true before use in LP reporting.

approved_by.description: Email of the person who approved this valuation. Required if human_approved=true.

approved_at.description: UTC datetime of approval. Required if human_approved=true.

id.description: UUID v4 for this valuation record.

deal_slug.description: Slug of the parent deal. Used in file path.

update_trigger_ref.description: Relative path to the DealUpdate that triggered this valuation. Null if triggered by schedule or manual run.

trigger_type.description: What caused this valuation to be run.

prior_value_ref.description: Relative path to the immediately preceding valuation record for this deal. Enables time-series comparison.

prior_value_mid_usd.description: The value_mid_usd from the prior valuation, copied here for quick delta calculation without file lookup.

value_delta_usd.description: result.value_mid_usd minus prior_value_mid_usd. Positive = appreciation, negative = depreciation.

created_at.description: UTC datetime when this valuation record was created.

memo_path.description: Relative path to a narrative valuation memo, if one was written.
